Opal Rayfam Promo - Less Than 24 Hours Left

There's less than 24 hours left to receive an Ogrika Niruch with every purchase of the Opal Rayfam! 

The Opal Rayfam has already been whiteboxed in UE5 and will be available for early flight in the next Star Atlas release! 

Here’s a WIP sneak peek of the interior.
